title: agora-flutter: Rust FFI bridge crate skeleton
description:
Create flutter-bridge/ Rust cdylib crate in the workspace. Expose agora-core API via flutter_rust_bridge annotations. Must cargo-check clean on host target without Flutter SDK.

What: A new Rust crate at flutter-bridge/ that wraps agora-core functions for Dart FFI.

Algorithm:
1. Create flutter-bridge/Cargo.toml (crate-type = cdylib + rlib, deps: agora-core, flutter_rust_bridge, tokio, anyhow, base64)
2. Add flutter-bridge to workspace Cargo.toml members
3. Create flutter-bridge/src/lib.rs with flutter_rust_bridge::frb(dart_metadata) annotation
4. Create flutter-bridge/src/api/identity.rs: expose identity_generate() -> Vec<u8>, identity_from_secret(secret: Vec<u8>) -> String (returns pub_id), keyfile_encrypt(secret: Vec<u8>, passphrase: String) -> Vec<u8>, keyfile_decrypt(ciphertext: Vec<u8>, passphrase: String) -> Vec<u8>
5. Create flutter-bridge/src/api/hpke.rs: expose seal_message(recipient_pub_key: Vec<u8>, plaintext: Vec<u8>) -> Vec<u8>, unseal_message(secret_key: Vec<u8>, sealed: Vec<u8>) -> Vec<u8>
6. Create flutter-bridge/src/api/mod.rs re-exporting submodules
7. Verify cargo check -p agora-flutter-bridge passes

Defensive rules: never log secret bytes, all Vec<u8> representing secrets must be zeroed when done, all Result<T> returned as anyhow::Result<T> for frb error translation.

Acceptance: cargo check -p agora-flutter-bridge clean; no warnings; security invariant: no secret bytes appear in any log call.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p agora-flutter-bridge exits 0; grep -r 'log.*secret\|debug.*secret' flutter-bridge/ exits 1 (no secret logging)
close_reason: flutter-bridge crate created; identity/keyfile/hpke FFI API; cargo check clean
